title: Our top TV deals for Black Friday 2025
author: Electriz TechTalk
excerpt: We’ve got some great offers you can binge on. Here are our top picks for Black Friday TV deals in 2025.
content:
Black Friday 2025 is here, with loads of showstopping TV deals. It’s the perfect time to upgrade your entertainment, and make everything from movie nights to match days look better than ever. From great value 4K Ultra HD TVs to dazzling OLED TVs, there’s something for every space and budget.

We’ve rounded up our top 10 TV deals from big brands like Sony, Samsung and LG. Check them out and get in there before they’re gone.

## TV deals at a glance

| Product Name | Type | Standout Feature | Original price | Deal Price | You Save | Best For |

## Best budget Black Friday TV deals - prices you can’t turn down!

### JVC CT150 32-inch HD TV

Simple, smart and compact, the JVC CT150 32-inch HD TV is made for smaller spaces like kitchens, guest rooms or student flats. Plug it in, connect to Wi-Fi, and you’re good to go. You can watch live and on-demand telly over the internet without spending a penny, no aerial needed.

### Hisense A6Q 43-inch 4K TV

A brilliant all-rounder for the price. The Hisense A6Q 43-inch 4K TV brings crisp 4K detail and rich colour that make films and footy look great. It’s got all the big streaming apps ready to go, and the size is spot on for smaller living rooms or bedrooms.

### LG NANO81A 43" NanoCell AI 4K HDR Smart TV

With punchy colours, smooth motion and AI smarts, the LG NANO81A 43" NanoCell AI 4K HDR Smart TV hits that sweet spot between price and performance. It’s ideal for film nights, gaming or a Netflix marathon, and its slim design fits neatly in most rooms.

## Best mid-range Black Friday TV deals - quality entertainment!

### Sony Bravia 3 50" LED 4K HDR AI Smart TV

The Sony Bravia 3 50" LED 4K HDR AI Smart TV gives you that classic Sony picture sharpness without having to pay a premium price. Its clever AI processor makes colours pop and keeps things smooth, and with Google TV built-in, finding your next binge is easy. Great for families after a quality upgrade.

### Samsung QN90F 55-inch Neo QLED Mini-LED TV

The Samsung QN90F 55-inch Neo QLED Mini-LED TV handles bright rooms like a champ, with Mini-LED lighting that keeps everything clear and colourful, even on sunny days. Great for watching live sport or gaming in 4K – and it looks just as sharp off as it does on.

### Samsung QN70F 55-inch Neo QLED 4K Mini LED Vision AI Smart TV

The Samsung QN70F 55-inch Neo QLED 4K Mini LED Vision AI Smart TV is big, bright, and full of colour. Vision AI tweaks the picture automatically depending on what you’re watching, so films, games and boxsets all look their best. A cracking mid-range pick for busy households.

## Best premium Black Friday TV deals - a feast for the eyes!

### LG B5 55" OLED AI 4K HDR Smart TV 2025

OLED TVs are famous for deep, deep blacks and rich contrast. And the LG B5 55" OLED AI 4K HDR Smart TV 2025 gives you all that at a less-than-premium price. The a8 AI processor works hard in the background, upscaling the picture and audio of everything you watch. Even older entertainment is given a new look!

### LG C5 65-inch OLED TV

The LG C5 65-inch OLED TV is a crowd-pleaser. With self-lit OLED pixels, you get incredible depth and contrast – think deep blacks and bright highlights that make everything feel cinematic. Add in a sleek frame and super-fast response for gaming, and it’s a real showpiece.

### Sony Bravia 8A 65" OLED 4K HDR AI Smart TV

The Sony Bravia 8A 65" OLED 4K HDR AI Smart TV pulls you right into the action. With over 8 million self-lit pixels, it paints every scene with deep blacks and lively colours. And it sounds as good as it looks. Acoustic Surface Audio+ turns the screen into a speaker, with audio coming from exactly where the action is happening.

### Samsung S95F 55" OLED Glare Free 4K Vision AI Smart TV

The Samsung S95F 55" OLED Glare Free 4K Vision AI Smart TV is bright, bold and built for any room. Its glare-free screen means you can watch comfortably even in daylight, and its Vision AI keeps colours balanced and true to life. This is a great choice for film lovers who want a cinematic look and feel.

## Ready for action?

Check out our TV buying guide for top tips on the type of telly that’ll suit you the best. If you’re looking for more tech offers, head on over to our Black Friday deals page.
